questions.question: Explain the difference between INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN and RIGHT JOIN in SQL.
questions.hint: Describe the types of joins and their use cases

questions.question: Describe the concept of Normalization in a Database Management System. Provide an example of a 3rd Normal Form (3NF) table.
questions.hint: Explain the benefits of Normalization and provide a 3NF table example

questions.question: Write a SQL query to retrieve the names of all employees who earn more than the average salary in the 'employees' table.
questions.hint: Use the AVG() function and compare salaries to the average
